title.rendered: Top Easter Holiday Destinations for UK Travelers in 2024

content.rendered:
As the Easter holidays approach, UK travelers are eagerly preparing for their next adventure, visiting destinations that offer the perfect blend of relaxation, exploration, and excitement. From tropical escapes to cultural odysseys, here are the top Easter holiday destinations capturing the imagination of UK holidaymakers in 2024.

1. Barbados, Caribbean

With its palm-fringed beaches, crystalline waters, and vibrant culture, Barbados is a perennial favourite for Easter getaways. From lounging on the powdery sands of Crane Beach to exploring historic plantation houses and indulging in fresh seafood delicacies, Barbados offers a paradise-like setting for an unforgettable Easter holiday.

2. Doha, Qatar

As the capital city of Qatar gears up to host the FIFA World Cup in 2022, Doha has emerged as a must-visit destination for UK travelers seeking a blend of luxury and adventure. Explore the futuristic skyline of West Bay, wander through the historic Souq Waqif, or embark on a desert safari for a taste of Arabian hospitality and culture.

3. Turkey

With its rich history, stunning landscapes, and warm hospitality, Turkey beckons UK holidaymakers looking for an Easter getaway filled with exploration and discovery. From the ancient wonders of Istanbul to the sun-kissed beaches of the Turquoise Coast, Turkey offers a diverse array of experiences, whether you’re interested in history, culture, or simply unwinding by the sea.

4. Rhodes, Greece

Steeped in history and surrounded by azure waters, Rhodes is a Greek island gem that promises an Easter holiday filled with enchantment and adventure. Explore the cobbled streets of Rhodes Town’s medieval Old Town, soak up the sun on pristine beaches, or discover ancient ruins and hidden coves as you traverse this captivating island paradise.

5. Costa del Sol, Spain

Bask in the Mediterranean sunshine on the Costa del Sol, where Easter holidays are synonymous with relaxation, indulgence, and endless coastal charm. From the vibrant resort town of Marbella to the picturesque villages of Mijas and Nerja, the Costa del Sol offers something for every traveler, whether you’re seeking gourmet cuisine, world-class golf, or simply soaking up the laid-back Spanish lifestyle.

6. Canary Islands, Spain

Escape to the Canary Islands for an Easter holiday filled with sunshine, adventure, and natural beauty. Whether you’re hiking through volcanic landscapes in Lanzarote, sunbathing on the golden shores of Fuerteventura, or exploring the cosmopolitan streets of Tenerife’s Santa Cruz, the Canary Islands offer an idyllic setting for an unforgettable Easter break.

7. Croatia

Discover the charms of Croatia this Easter, where medieval cities, pristine beaches, and stunning national parks await. Explore the ancient city walls of Dubrovnik, sail the azure waters of the Adriatic Sea, or immerse yourself in the natural wonders of Plitvice Lakes National Park for an Easter holiday filled with unforgettable experiences.

Don’t Forget Your Travel Money!

If you’re planning to visit any of the above destinations, don’t forget to order your travel money in advance and have your currency delivered to your door. Travel FX offers market-leading rates and 5-star excellent service, ensuring a hassle-free experience as you prepare for your Easter getaway. So pack your bags, gather your loved ones, and get ready to create cherished memories on an Easter holiday to remember.

Ready to order you currency?

  • Buy Barbadian Dollars
  • Buy Euros
  • Buy Qatari Riyal
  • Buy Turkish Lira

@graph.name: Lucy Reed
@graph.description: Hi! I’m Lucy, as well as writing blog posts I lead Customer Experience and UX at Travel FX. With over 15 years’ experience in the foreign exchange industry, I specialise in helping UK travellers understand exchange rates, avoid unnecessary fees, and feel confident about their travel money before they fly. Having lived both in the UK and overseas, and travelled extensively over the years, I understand first-hand how important it is to get the details right when you’re planning a trip. From managing your travel budget to choosing the right foreign currency or travel money card, small decisions can make a big difference.
